long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs02.cx01.mum04 et-2/0/15 <-> dar02.mum03 et-0/1/7. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19898
short_description: cbs02.cx01.mum04 et-2/0/15 <-> dar02.mum03 et-0/1/7 | Link Flap
close_notes: Our provider will be engaged to get an RFO, however no customer affection has been reported or noticed during this event.
